prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Gas piping, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: missing sediment trap/drip leg. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IFGC, NFPA 54.
title: Compliance check: Gas piping (residential job)
